title: tabp evidence record
description: Per-candidate evidence record written to <project>/.tabp/runs/<run-id>/evidence-<candidate-id>.json. Every judgment must cite non-empty source evidence from the CV (AC-4: source-grounded evidence). PII-minimal rule: candidate_name holds only a name or anonymised label — no contact details, no protected-class attributes, no secrets.

run_id.description: Run identifier this evidence record belongs to.

candidate_id.description: Unique candidate identifier within this run. E.g. 'candidate-01'.

candidate_name.description: Candidate name or anonymised label. No contact details or protected-class attributes.

requirements.description: Per-requirement judgments with cited CV evidence. Each entry must have non-empty evidence (AC-4).

evidence.description: Cited CV evidence supporting the judgment. Must be non-empty (AC-4: no invented evidence).

score.description: Composite score for this candidate, range 0..100.

band.description: Scoring band derived from the score.

must_have_gate.description: Must-have gate result: 'OK' if all must-have requirements are met, or 'Missing:<comma-separated-list>' if any are missing.

fairness_check_passed.description: Whether the fairness guardrail check passed for this candidate.

bias_flags.description: List of bias flags raised during screening. Empty array when none detected.
